reviews.review_description: Does not install.. I want my money back. Also, reviews are locked at 5 stars. What a joke. This is actually a very negative review (zero stars).

My daughter loves this game.  It has gaze select as well as tap which makes it easy for little kids who have a tough time with the touch pad. The story has little puzzles for the kids and a lot of careers. The graphics are very good and this game looks great. Not only is it a great vr pop up book but it's the first game with AR components. Its fun watching while she has the book and characters running all over the floor. They also have a android and iPhone app.

reviews.review_title: Its a nice MR POC on GearVr
reviews.review_description: Its ok about tracking but gets too hot very fast.

reviews.review_title: Excellent for kids of all ages
reviews.review_description: Your kids will love to interact with various objects of fun! Loved the AR and VR possibilities! A must have game!
I am disappointed about, it not was a fullscreen AR mode... Hope you will redo it😉
